title: Dicky Beach Family Holiday Park
description: Humble rooms with kitchenettes and patios, plus an outdoor pool, a tennis court and an arcade.
address: Beerburrum St, Dicky Beach QLD 4551, Australia
hotelDescription:
Adjacent to Dicky Beach, this humble caravan park with motel-style rooms is 4.9 km from the Queensland Air Museum and 15 km from Aussie World amusement park.
 The 12 informal rooms feature exposed brick walls, and come with kitchenettes, free Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs. They also include covered patios with seating.
 Outdoor facilities include a pool, a tennis court, a playground and BBQ grills. The property also offers an arcade and a coin-operated laundry.

title: Ingenia Holidays Noosa
description: Bright cabins in an informal resort with an outdoor pool, a cafe & a game room, plus free parking.
address: 2/141 Cooroy Noosa Rd, Tewantin QLD 4565, Australia
hotelDescription:
Off State Route 6, this down-to-earth resort is a 9-minute walk from Noosa Golf Club, 10 km from shopping and dining in Noosa Heads, and 12 km from Noosa National Park.
 Bright, relaxed cabins come with Wi-Fi access, TVs and kitchenettes, as well as furnished patios or decks. Upgraded cabins feature full kitchens.
 Amenities include an outdoor pool, a kids' pool and a BBQ area, plus a cafe, a game room and a guest kitchen. Parking is complimentary.
